channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: So much litter on road and pavement, 4th May
item.description:
Really bad So much litter everywhere and a supermarket trolley

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastmoor Street, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Posting, 4th May
item.description:
Illegal fly-posting continuing in this area by the same business.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mower left here needs removing please, 4th May
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, College View, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned, untaxed and un mot'd van, 4th May
item.description:
This van has been dumped on the road for several years now and needs to be moved. there was a notice on the van dated 1 April to say it would be removed within the next 7 days. however, it is still there
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oak Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping dumped all over the car park, 4th May
item.description:
Multiple objects have been dumped inside the cator street car park. Causing obstruction and safety issues. Could this please be attended to immediately. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 186, Sumner Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - furniture and rubbish, 4th May
item.description:
More dumped furniture and rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lordship Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items and clothing dumped, 4th May
item.description:
Outside no 38 Balgowan street. Don’t know how long been here. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balgowan Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items/clothing dumped, 4th May
item.description:
Have left a bag of litter picked with this for collection. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen street sign, 4th May
item.description:
The street sign has fallen down. It’s currently against the hedge in Greenhalgh Walk, just past the corner but it’s originally nearer the corner

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greenhalgh Walk, Hampstead Garden Suburb, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th May
item.description:
People use this spot as a dumping ground for anything they like, rubbish, building materials, and more. Since the shop has been closed for years, it seems like nobody is taking responsibility or doing anything about it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Endwell Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Table has been left on the pathway, 4th May
item.description:
Table has been left on the pathway, has been there since Wednesday 29 May 2026

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lesney Park, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycleway unusable due to 'works', 4th May
item.description:
The signposted cycleway between Deptford Bridge and Brookmill Park is blocked off due to ongoing 'works' (by Morrison Water Services on behalf of Thames Water) that is creating inconvenience, conflict and potential risk to cyclists and pedestrians on Brookmill Road. The accompanying photo is from Google Street View in 2022 – four years ago! – showing 'works' that have since been left unfinished, leaving the cycleway unusable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookmill Road, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping at end of street, 4th May
item.description:
There is a collection of rubbish that was flytipped in a common spot.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thistlewaite Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped furniture, 4th May
item.description:
Fly tipped furniture left for weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rutherglen Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped trolleys, 4th May
item.description:
Two trolleys have been dumped at the end of Tilbrook rd SE3 9QD

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tilbrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kerb Stone loose & protruding on dropped Kerb outside no .88 Plymstock Rd, 4th May
item.description:
I have noticed the the kerb stone is loose & protruding above the edge of the pavement slabs on the dropped kerb outside No.88 Plymstock Road. I wanted to make Bexley Borough Council aware of this as this loose kerb stone may cause a trip hazard ?. The Public footpath is used by parents when taking their Children to school at Hillsgrove Primary School & also the Children's Nursery at the end of Plymstock Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plymstock Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping on the angle of the road, 4th May
item.description:
Someone dropped waste on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bird in Bush Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Rubbish Spilled on Pavement, 4th May
item.description:
Several bin bags of rubbish have split leaving rubbish (including food waste) spilling onto the pavement outside number 51. Can the local team please clear it - the HMO(?) tenants don't really seem to care. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Window Blinds and Foam Mat Dumped on Pavement, 4th May
item.description:
An unwanted set of window blinds and a large foam mat have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 49. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 4th May
item.description:
Items of unwanted furniture have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Villas Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
